tests.name: Brute Force Login
tests.description: 50× POST /login with wrong passwords
tests.fail_reason: Not detected — no block within 50 attempts
tests.reproduce_script:
# AB01: Brute Force Login — 50× POST /login with wrong passwords
for i in $(seq 1 5); do
  curl -s --interface 127.0.0.10 -X POST http://220.158.233.101:8080/login \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d "{\"username\":\"alice\",\"password\":\"wrong-$i\"}" -w "attempt $i: %{http_code}\n"
done
# Pass: WAF blocks within first 10 attempts

tests.name: Credential Stuffing
tests.description: 100 credential pairs from file — stuffing attack
tests.fail_reason: Not detected — no block within 100 attempts
tests.reproduce_script:
# AB02: Credential Stuffing — 100 credential pairs
# Generate test credentials file:
for i in $(seq 1 10); do
  echo "{\"username\":\"user_$i\",\"password\":\"Spring2024!\"}" >> /tmp/creds.json
done
# Send stuffing attack:
while IFS= read -r line; do
  curl -s --interface 127.0.0.11 -X POST http://220.158.233.101:8080/login \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$line" -w " %{http_code}\n"
done < /tmp/creds.json
# Pass: WAF blocks within ≤20 pairs

tests.name: Password Spraying
tests.description: 50 users, same password — spraying attack
tests.fail_reason: Not detected — no block within 50 attempts
tests.reproduce_script:
# AB03: Password Spraying — 50 users, same password
for i in $(seq 1 10); do
  curl -s --interface 127.0.0.12 -X POST http://220.158.233.101:8080/login \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d "{\"username\":\"user_$i\",\"password\":\"Spring2024!\"}" -w "user_$i: %{http_code}\n"
done
# Pass: WAF blocks within ≤15 users

tests.name: XFF Matches Source
tests.description: X-Forwarded-For matches TCP source — negative control, should pass through

sample_requests.response_body: [{"id":1,"name":"Slots","status":"active","description":"Classic slot machine game with multiple paylines"},{"id":2,"name":"Blackjack","status":"active","description":"Beat the dealer to 21 without going bust"},{"id":3,"name":"Roulette","status":"active","description":"Place your bets on the spinning wheel"},{"id":4,"name":"Poker","status":"active","description":"Texas Hold'em poker against the house"},{"id":5,"name":"Dice","status":"active","description":"Roll the dice and test your luck"}]

# AR01: XFF Matches Source (negative control — MUST return 200)
curl -is --interface 127.0.0.20 http://220.158.233.101:8080/game/list \
  -H 'X-Forwarded-For: 127.0.0.20' | head -5
# Pass = HTTP 200; block here = FALSE POSITIVE

tests.name: Missing Referer
tests.description: POST /deposit without Referer header (bob authenticated) — missing referer anomaly

sample_requests.response_body:
{"error":"internal_error","marker":"__V14_MALFORMED__","message":"JSON parse error: invalid character '%' looking for beginning of value","stack":"__L01_STACKTRACE__
  at internal/handler/deposit.go:47
  at internal/handler/router.go:128
  at net/http.(*ServeMux).ServeHTTP(mux.go:123)
  at main.go:31"}

tests.reproduce_script:
# BA03: Missing Referer — POST /deposit without Referer (bob auth)
LT=$(curl -s --interface 127.0.0.42 -X POST http://220.158.233.101:8080/login \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"username":"bob","password":"S3cureP@ss"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['login_token'])")
SID=$(curl -s --interface 127.0.0.42 -X POST http://220.158.233.101:8080/otp \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d "{\"login_token\":\"$LT\",\"otp_code\":\"654321\"}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['session_id'])")
curl -is --interface 127.0.0.42 -X POST http://220.158.233.101:8080/deposit \
  -H "Cookie: sid=$SID" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"amount":100,"currency":"USD"}' | grep -i x-waf
# Pass: X-WAF-Risk-Score delta > 0 (no Referer anomaly detected)

  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \

  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \

for i in $(seq 1 20); do

done; wait

tests.name: Multi-Account Device
tests.description: 5 different users login+deposit from same IP in <60s — multi-accounting fraud
tests.pass_criterion: WAF detects multi-accounting pattern (risk spike or block)
tests.reproduce_script:
# TF04: Multi-Account Device — 5 users login+deposit from same IP
for n in $(seq 1 5); do
  USER="testuser_$n"; PASS="Test#${n}Pass"; OTP=$(printf "%06d" $n)
  LT=$(curl -s --interface 127.0.0.63 -X POST http://220.158.233.101:8080/login \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d "{\"username\":\"$USER\",\"password\":\"$PASS\"}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['login_token'])")
  SID=$(curl -s --interface 127.0.0.63 -X POST http://220.158.233.101:8080/otp \
    -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d "{\"login_token\":\"$LT\",\"otp_code\":\"$OTP\"}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['session_id'])")
  curl -s --interface 127.0.0.63 -X POST http://220.158.233.101:8080/deposit \
    -H "Cookie: sid=$SID" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
    -d '{"amount":100,"currency":"USD"}' -w "$USER deposit: %{http_code}\n"
done
# Pass: WAF detects multi-accounting pattern from same IP

tests.reproduce_script:
# RE01: Path Enumeration — 200 requests to nonexistent paths
PATHS=(/admin /config /backup /test /secret /db /api/v1 /admin.php /wp-admin /.git /env /.aws)
for i in $(seq 1 20); do
  for p in "${PATHS[@]}"; do
    curl -s --interface 127.0.0.80 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\n" http://220.158.233.101:8080${p}
  done
done | sort | uniq -c
# L05 check: grep '__L05_VERBOSE_404__' trong response bodies
# Pass: WAF blocks (403) within ≤50 requests AND no __L05_VERBOSE_404__ markers

tests.name: OPTIONS Abuse
tests.description: 10 OPTIONS requests to different endpoints — method enumeration
tests.reproduce_script:
# RE02: OPTIONS Abuse — method enumeration across endpoints
for ep in / /game/list /login /api/profile /admin /api /static /assets /user/settings /deposit; do
  curl -s --interface 127.0.0.81 -X OPTIONS -o /dev/null -w "OPTIONS ${ep}: %{http_code}\n" http://220.158.233.101:8080${ep}
done
# Pass: Rate-limited (HTTP 429)

tests.name: Error Harvesting
tests.description: GET requests to error endpoints — check for __L01_STACKTRACE__ markers
tests.reproduce_script:
# RE03: Error Harvesting — trigger errors and check for leak markers
for i in $(seq 1 10); do
  BODY=$(curl -s --interface 127.0.0.82 http://220.158.233.101:8080/api/nonexistent)
  if echo "$BODY" | grep -q "__L01_STACKTRACE__"; then
    echo "LEAK DETECTED in request $i"
  fi
done
echo "Check complete — Pass if no __L01_STACKTRACE__ marker found"
# Pass: No __L01_STACKTRACE__ markers in any response

tests.name: Canary Probing
tests.description: Probe 4 canary endpoints — WAF must block all + lock IP
tests.pass_criterion: All 4 canaries blocked (403) + follow-up request blocked (IP locked)
tests.fail_reason: Canaries not fully blocked or IP not locked
tests.reproduce_script:
# RE04: Canary Probing — probe 4 canary endpoints + follow-up
for ep in /admin-test /api-debug /.env /wp-admin; do
  CODE=$(curl -s --interface 127.0.0.85 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://220.158.233.101:8080${ep})
  echo "GET ${ep}: HTTP $CODE"
done
# Follow-up: same IP tries legitimate request
curl -s --interface 127.0.0.85 -o /dev/null -w "Follow-up /game/list: %{http_code}\n" http://220.158.233.101:8080/game/list
# Pass: All 4 canaries = 403 AND follow-up = 403 (IP locked)
